expectedVideo: higher scale should produce visibly denser noise detail
the noise field should keep moving rather than freezing or banding
expectedAudio: higher scale should materially alter the rendered noise spectrum through the low-pass mapping
the rendered noise should stay full-range rather than collapsing or clipping
manualChecks: Does the denser noise field feel like the same move as the rendered timbral change?
Does the rendered noise stay usable rather than turning dull or broken at the high setting?
